# Karrie International — Precision Metal Fabrication
Last updated: 2026-04-01

## Company Overview
- **HQ:** Hong Kong / Shenzhen, China
- Listed on Hong Kong Stock Exchange (1050.HK)
- Revenue: ~$300-500M USD annually
- Specialty: precision metal enclosures, sheet metal components, structural assemblies for electronics
- Customers: Cisco, HP, Dell, Huawei, ZTE, major server OEMs

## Role in NVL72 Supply Chain
- Karrie supplies **precision metal structural components** for server and networking hardware
- NVL72 tray context: Karrie likely manufactures the tray enclosure sheet metal, structural brackets, and chassis panels that house the liquid cooling manifold
- They do NOT manufacture the manifold itself — they make the metal structures the manifold is mounted into
- High-volume precision stamping and welding = relevant to manifold bracket fabrication

## Products Relevant to NVL72
- Server chassis sheet metal (precision stamped, welded)
- Enclosure panels and structural assemblies
- Custom fabrications for server/networking OEMs
- Rack and blade server mechanical assemblies

## ADC Relevance
- Second-tier supply chain: structural metal components inside NVL72 trays
- China-based supplier: geopolitical supply chain risk flag
- Not a direct ADC vendor
